# ToolSuiteX

> ToolSuiteX is a free, browser-based suite of 50+ professional online tools for developers, designers, marketers, students, and business professionals. All tools run 100% in the browser — no signup, no uploads, no tracking. Data never leaves your device.

Website: https://toolsuitex.online
Alternate: https://toolsuitex.netlify.app

## About

- Fully client-side (privacy-first): files and text are processed locally in the browser.
- No account, no login, no cost.
- Works offline after first load.
- Categories: Professional Suite, Security Suite, Developer Suite, Content Suite, Image Suite, PDF Suite.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://toolsuitex.online/): Overview of the entire tool suite.
- [All Tools](https://toolsuitex.online/tools): Browsable catalog of every tool with search and category filters.
- [About](https://toolsuitex.online/about): Mission and product background.
- [Contact](https://toolsuitex.online/contact): Support and inquiries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://toolsuitex.online/privacy): Data handling and privacy commitments.
- [Terms of Service](https://toolsuitex.online/terms): Usage terms.

## Professional Suite

- [AI Resume Builder](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/resume-builder): Build ATS-optimized resumes with 12+ themes, 500+ colors, gradient presets, and PDF export.
- [CV Maker](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/cv-maker): Create detailed academic CVs with sections for education, publications, awards, and skills.
- [Cover Letter Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/cover-letter-generator): Generate tailored professional cover letters.
- [Invoice Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/invoice-generator): Create professional invoices offline with automatic calculations and PDF export.
- [Business Card Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/business-card-generator): Design double-sided business cards with 500+ colors, gradients, logos, QR codes, and PDF print export.
- [Portfolio Builder](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/portfolio-builder): Build a portfolio website with 12+ templates and export as standalone HTML.

## Security Suite

- [Custom Encoder/Decoder](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/custom-encoder): Multi-layer proprietary cipher encoding.
- [Password Strength Meter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/password-strength): Analyze password strength with crack-time estimates.
- [Secure Hash Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/hash-generator): Generate SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, and SHA-1 hashes.
- [Secret Notes](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/secret-notes): Create encrypted one-time notes with shareable links.
- [JWT Decoder](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens.

## Developer Suite

- [JSON Formatter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, and beautify JSON.
- [JSON to CSV](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/json-to-csv): Convert JSON data to CSV format.
- [Code Minifier](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/code-minifier): Minify HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- [Code Beautifier](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/code-beautifier): Beautify minified code.
- [SQL Formatter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/sql-formatter): Format and beautify SQL queries.
- [Regex Tester](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/regex-tester): Test and debug regular expressions.
- [Unit Converter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/unit-converter): Convert length, weight, temperature, data, and time units.
- [Number Base Converter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/base-converter): Convert binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert between Unix timestamps and human dates.
- [Cron Builder](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/cron-builder): Build and validate cron expressions.
- [Sitemap Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/sitemap-generator): Generate SEO-friendly XML sitemaps.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/meta-tag-generator): Generate SEO meta tags and Open Graph tags.
- [SEO Audit Tool](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/seo-audit): Audit on-page SEO and get a 0-100 score.
- [Fake Data Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/fake-data-generator): Generate realistic test data as JSON or CSV.
- [Email Validator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/email-validator): Validate email addresses in bulk.
- [Phone Validator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/phone-validator): Validate phone numbers with country detection.
- [QR Code Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi, email, and more.
- [Barcode Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/barcode-generator): Generate Code 128, EAN-13, UPC, and Code 39 barcodes.
- [URL Shortener](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/url-shortener): Create shorter, shareable URLs.

## Content Suite

- [Word Counter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time.
- [Case Converter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/case-converter): Convert text case (upper, lower, title, camel, snake).
- [Text Diff](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/text-diff): Compare two texts and highlight differences.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/lorem-generator): Generate placeholder text.
- [Markdown Editor](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/markdown-editor): Live-preview markdown editor.
- [Prompt Optimizer](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/prompt-optimizer): Improve AI prompts for better results.

## Image Suite

- [Image Compressor](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/image-compressor): Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images.
- [Image Converter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/image-converter): Convert images between JPG, PNG, WebP formats.
- [Image Resizer](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/image-resizer): Resize images to any dimensions.
- [Image Rotator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/image-rotator): Rotate and flip images.
- [Image to PDF](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/image-to-pdf): Convert images to PDF documents.
- [Favicon Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/favicon-generator): Generate favicons in multiple sizes.
- [Logo Mockup Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/logo-mockup): Preview logos on real-world mockups.
- [SVG Optimizer](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/svg-optimizer): Optimize and minify SVG files.
- [Color Picker](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/color-picker): Pick colors and get HEX, RGB, HSL values.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/css-gradient-generator): Design CSS gradients visually.

## PDF Suite

- [PDF Merger](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/pdf-merge): Merge multiple PDF files into one.
- [PDF Splitter](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/pdf-split): Split PDF into separate pages.
- [PDF Compressor](https://toolsuitex.online/tools/pdf-compress): Reduce PDF file size.

## Optional

- [Sitemap XML](https://toolsuitex.online/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap.
- [Robots.txt](https://toolsuitex.online/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
